leaderboard_endpoints.notes: timeWindow: day (=7d aggregated), week, month (=30d), allTime. For 90d we use allTime and filter by date. Official API docs: https://hyperliquid.gitbook.io/hyperliquid-docs/for-developers/api/info-endpoint

perp.roi_sort_param: Leaderboard response is pre-sorted by accountValue change (ROI proxy)

7d.notes: Requires client-side aggregation of daily windows

90d.notes: allTime available, we filter to 90d window

field_map.accountValue: derived: compute ROI from accountValue changes
field_map.displayName: display_name (may be null for anonymous wallets)

perp.missing_reason: Hyperliquid is a DEX with no copy trading. Win rate requires trade-level computation from userFills. Max drawdown computed from equity curve.

timeseries_endpoints.notes: Funding payments, combined with fills for equity curve

rate_limits.notes: Generous public API, 1200 req/min documented limit

anti_scraping.mitigation: Standard REST API, no special measures needed
